title: astragalus lacteus
intro: Astragalus lacteus, also known as milk vetch or white milk vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb native to North America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and preventing infections. Astragalus lacteus is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
